_comment: Offline metadata + fallback pool for CLOUD models. Used when a provider's API key is NOT set (so the router can still route across providers), and to tag/price models even when discovered live. Edit freely to add the models you actually use. Local Ollama models are auto-discovered live and are NOT listed here.
_comment_claude_cli: 'claude-cli' uses your Claude Pro/Max SUBSCRIPTION via the `claude` CLI (`claude -p --model <name>`) — no API key, no per-token billing. Names are the CLI's model aliases. Available automatically when the `claude` binary is installed and logged in.
